description_long: This is a freestanding blackboard with a rectangular green writing surface, supported by a sturdy black metal frame. The frame features two wide, stable legs and a horizontal support bar near the base, providing balance and durability. The writing surface is smooth and unmarked, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The frame has a glossy finish, reflecting light and giving it a polished appearance. No chalk holder or tray is visible beneath the writing surface. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for use in classrooms, meeting spaces, or public urban environments.
description: A freestanding green blackboard with a glossy black metal frame and no visible chalk holder, featuring a smooth, unmarked writing surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green writing surface and the black metal frame with both legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blackboard and the depth of the supporting frame.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular shape of the writing surface and the absence of a chalk holder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the frame's support structure.
attribute_frame_design: thick black metal frame with glossy finish and rectangular support legs
